'''Nus Whales''' were creatures native to [[Dorumaa]]. When food was plentiful, a Nus Whale could grow up to twenty [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in a single [[Standard year/Legends|year]]. As of [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], there was one herd of Nus Whales swimming Dorumaa's [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]], consisting of twelve [[Gender/Legends|cows]] and ten bulls. The bulls were at least 100 meters long, large enough to swallow a fishing boat in a single gulp, and the cows were 80 to 90 meters long. Despite being called whales, Nus Whales reproduced by laying [[Egg/Legends|eggs]], which would be buried in the deep ocean and took several years to hatch.<ref name="g">''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

Nus Whale could easily eat a fishing boat such as the ''[[Icon]]''. Nevertheless, some fisherbeings, such as ''Icon'' captain [[Drac Gerrat]], dreamed of hunting (or fishing) one Nus Whale to polish its [[Bone/Legends|bones]] and sell them as good luck charms.<ref name="g" />
